title: Translation to Impact: U.S. and Global Science, Technology, and Innovation Output
summary_en: Science, technology, and innovation activities expand the frontiers of fundamental and technical knowledge, often leading to new discoveries. These may be translated into outputs such as new products, licensed technologies, and companies, ultimately impacting economic output, productivity, and global trade. This thematic report presents indicators of these activities and the innovation process, which contribute to the economic competitiveness and national security of the United States and countr
title_cn: 成果转化效能：美国及全球科学、技术与创新产出状况
